metadata.title: PDAC spatial ecology source data
metadata.description: Source-data archive for a public-data spatial transcriptomics study of CAF-myeloid stromal architecture in pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma. This archive contains source data for the main and extended data figures. The associated code repository is https://github.com/zzf617128/pdac_spatial_ecology. Claim boundaries: GSE310352 CosMx evidence is interpreted at slide/FOV level, not patient/specimen level; TGF/EMT is interpreted as stromal-interface organization, not tumor-intrinsic EMT; no causal signaling or direct SPP1-CD44 validation is claimed.
